channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Fender american Ultra Jazz Bass V MN 2022 - arctic pearl — $2,627.14
item.description:
$2,627.14 · Excellent · Axel's Gear Outlet

Please contact me to adjust the shipping costs.

Up for sale is my Fender American Ultra Jazz Bass in the always-classic Arctic White finish with a maple Neck and black block inlays. This bass is an absolute workhorse—super comfortable, incredibly versatile, and built to sit perfectly in any mix.


Condition:

The bass is in excellent condition. No dings, cracks, or issues. Electronics are clean and quiet, neck is straight, frets are in great shape, and everything functions exactly as it should. 


Specs & Features:


  • Arctic White gloss finish
  • Maple neck with tinted satin back + maple fingerboard
  • Black block inlays
  • Noiseless Jazz pickups
  • Active/Passive switchable electronics
  • Fender HiMass bridge
  • 5-bolt neck plate
  • 4+1 lightweight tuning machines
  • Original Fender hard shell case (OHSC)

    Please contact me to adjust the shipping costs.

item.title: Ibanez SR505 Standard Soundgear Bass 2012 — $599
item.description:
$599 · Excellent · Bob's Used Gear

Five string Ibanez SR505 in excellent condition - only used this for some studio work. Zero corrosion in the battery compartment (as shown). Comes with a Roadrunner case (shown in pic)! Case is in very good condition with minor edge wear.

item.title: Yamaha TRBX304 Bass Guitar - Mist Green — $419.99
item.description:
$419.99 · Brand New · Big Apple Music

You’re the bedrock of your music. The foundation. The fundamental. You need an instrument with the strength and power to perform, an instrument that gives you the freedom to innovate and to create without limits. You need a bass where everything‘s just right - sound, looks, feel - nothing comes second.

With a unique combination of advanced design, precision engineering and time-honored craftsmanship, the Yamaha Guitar Development team has created the perfect instrument for bass players who aren’t willing to compromise - an instrument with the tone you need to underpin your performance and the flexibility to allow you to create and define your own voice. Offering unparalleled comfort, incredible playability and road-ready durability, night after night, session after session, this series was designed to be the core of your music.

This is TRBX. This is the bass you’ve been waiting for.



The TRBX300 is built to enhance your performance with a perfectly balanced, ultra-comfortable solid mahogany body that provides optimum tonal foundation. Performance EQ active circuitry gives instant access to perfectly dialed-in, stage-ready tones, coupled with the expressive control you crave.

  • Sculpted Body
  • 5-Piece Maple/Mahogany Neck
  • 2 YGD-designed M3 Ceramic Humbucking Pickups
  • 5-Way Performance EQ Tone Circuit

item.title: Sterling Sub-Series 4 string Bass - Black — $219.99
item.description:
$219.99 · Good · Superior Music / RadioShack

Good condition used bass guitar.
Ships fast with tracking from Superior Music. Custom strap included. Electronics work. Nice low action for easy playability.
Ships well protected. God bless

item.title: Music Man Short Scale StingRay 2021 - 3 Tone Sunburst — $2,642.11
item.description:
$2,642.11 · Excellent · Bass Direct

Stunning 2021 Musicman Short Scale StingRay!

This example is presented in very near mint condition and comes with its original case too.

An ash body finished in 3 tone sunburst, maple neck topped with a gorgeous maple fingerboard for versatility and warmth.

Musicman pickup and a passive control layout comprising of volume, coil selection and tone make this a fantastic sounding StingRay bass, lightweight too at under 4kg

  • Serial Number: F95679
  • Origin: USA
  • Year: 2021
  • Body Material: Alder
  • Colour: 3 tone sunburst
  • Finish: Gloss
  • Neck Finish: Satin
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Fingerboard: Maple
  • Inlays: Dots, side dots
  • Pickups: Musicman
  • Electronics: Passive
  • Controls: Volume, pickup coil selector, tone
  • Pickguard: N/A
  • Hardware: Chrome
  • Gig Bag/Case: Hardcase
  • Accessories: N/A
  • Frets: 22
  • String Spacing: 19mm
  • Nut Width: 38mm
  • Scale Length: 30”
  • Weight: 3.7kg/8lbs8oz

item.title: Fender Precicion Bass from 1977 in Natural with Hardcase — $4,764.67
item.description:
$4,764.67 · Good · No1 Guitar Center GmbH

This fabulous (used) Fender Precicion Bass from 1977 is for sale in our store.

The 1977 Fender Precision Bass is a true piece of music history and represents the classic Fender bass sound of the 1970s like few other instruments. With its solid construction, distinctive tone, and timeless design, it remains a highly sought-after vintage instrument for musicians and collectors alike.

The bolt-on maple neck from the CBS era provides a solid, direct playing feel with a classic profile and ensures quick response as well as excellent stability. Combined with the maple fingerboard, it produces a well-balanced tone with a warm character and comfortable playing control.

The signature split-coil pickup delivers the legendary Precision sound: thick, punchy, and yet clearly defined. Whether providing cutting bass lines in the mix or warm, rounded grooves, the 1977 Precision Bass stands out for its versatility and strong vintage character.

Reliable Fender hardware ensures stable tuning and underlines the instrument’s long-lasting durability, which has not diminished even after decades.

The 1977 Fender Precision Bass is therefore not only a classic of rock and pop history, but also an inspiring working instrument with unmistakable sound and true vintage attitude.

The instrument will be shipped in the original hardcase.

Apart from a few possible minor changes, this guitar is original.

All instruments are in the shop and will be serviced before shipping.

For international safe & secure shipping: Please send your country, city and postal code.

We will calculate the rate for you door to door.

For the import in your country we cannot certify Lacey Act, TSCA or other regulations.

This has to be done by the buyer.

item.title: Fender Telecaster Bass from 1973 in Vintage Blonde with formcase — $4,048.18
item.description:
$4,048.18 · Good · No1 Guitar Center GmbH

This fabulous (used) Fender Telecaster Bass in Vintage Blonde is for sale in our store.

The 1973 Fender Telecaster Bass in Vintage Blonde is an iconic electric bass that authentically reflects the classic Fender sound of the early 1970s. With its distinctive design and powerful, focused tone, it remains a highly sought-after vintage instrument for both collectors and musicians.

The bolt-on maple neck provides a stable, direct playing feel with a classic profile typical of early ’70s Telecaster basses. Combined with the maple fingerboard, it produces a bright, present fundamental tone with quick response and excellent articulation.

The single, powerful split-coil pickup delivers a thick, focused bass sound with plenty of depth and punch, ideal for rock, soul, and blues. Despite its simple design, the Telecaster Bass impresses with strong sonic presence and a distinctive vintage character.

Solid Fender hardware ensures reliable tuning stability and completes the instrument’s robust overall construction.

The 1973 Fender Telecaster Bass in Vintage Blonde is therefore not only a piece of music history, but also an inspiring working instrument with unmistakable character and authentic vintage tone.

The instrument will be shipped in the original hardcase.

Apart from a few possible minor changes, this guitar is original.

All instruments are in the shop and will be serviced before shipping.

For international safe & secure shipping: Please send your country, city and postal code.

We will calculate the rate for you door to door.

For the import in your country we cannot certify Lacey Act, TSCA or other regulations.

This has to be done by the buyer.

item.title: Fender Bass VI from 1961 in sunburst finish with case — $13,732.76
item.description:
$13,732.76 · Good · No1 Guitar Center GmbH

Neckdate 10-61, a rare collection piece that we sold at No.1 begining of the 90`s and now came back to us in the same condition we sold it over 30 years ago. The neck pickup routing was sanded a little bit deeper to lower the magnets to the strings. Have a look in the photo section and please check all details in the instrument profile.This guitar is, apart from some minor changes, original. This bass comes with EU cites I. All instruments are in the shop and will be serviced before shipping. For international safe&secure shipping: Please send your country, city, and postal code. We will calculate the rate for you door to door. For import in your country we cannot certify Lace Act or TSCA or other regulations. This has to be done by the buyer.

Off course you can visit us any time during our shop hours and test our selection of vintage guitars. It is best to make an appointment with us for this purpose, so that we have time for you with a coffee to demonstrate you the vibe of vintage guitars, amps & effects from the legendary times of Rock`n Roll.

item.title: Gibson The Ripper Bass Late 70s — $3,000
item.description:
$3,000 · Excellent · Alison's Bass Gear

This bass is in excellent condition and has all its original parts and its original hard case (case is in very good shape). Natural wood finish. Nobs and switch for changing pick-up combinations all work great.

item.title: Taylor Used GS Mini-E Koa Bass '26 — $695
item.description:
$695 · Excellent · Dave's Guitar Shop

Natural, Matte finish, Miniature Grand Symphony body shape, Hawaiian Koa top, Three Ring Plastic Rosette, GS Mini bracing, Layered Koa back and sides, West African Crelicam Ebony fingerboard with the Italian Acrylic 4mm dot inlays on a Tropical Mahogany neck, 23.5″ scale length, 1 11/16th” nut width, Cast/sealed tuners, The neck thickness is .85″ at the first and .90″ at the 9th frets, With the ES-B pickup system and gig bag, Excellent

item.title: TWO Sadowsky's NYC UV-60 & NYC MV5-70 from 2008 — $14,926.91
item.description:
$14,926.91 · Excellent · Particulier

Two Sadowsky NYC from 2008. No separate sale, they are too complementary to be sold separately.

- UV-60 (4 string) : One piece alder body (not chambered), maple neck, Brazilian rosewood board, Sadowsky pup's in 60's position, Sadowsky preamp with VTC (vintage tone control). Color candy apple orange with matching headstock. Sadowsky blue stainless steel string 45-105. A Sadowsky detuner in gift. Sadowsky soft case. Weight : 4kg. Birth April 2008.

- MV5-70 (5 string) : Two piece alder body (chambered), maple neck, flamed maple board, Sadowsky pup's in 70's position (very rare), Sadowsky preamp with VTC (vintage tone control). Color candy apple orange. Sadowsky blue stainless steel string 45-130. Soft case (not Sadowsky). Weight : 3,8kg. Birth September 2008.

The UV-60 is a Fender L serie in passive mode. In active, is a slap machine. Very growly with very big low and agressive high (in the good way). She's like a Pitt-bull on steroids but can be smooth if you want !!!

The MV5-70 is more polite. Something beetwen Marcus Miller and Geddy Lee. Big low, growly mid and précise hight (but not harsh). Very versatile bass !!!

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI – Olympic White + Intonated Rubber Bridge – Professionally Set Up — $585.13
item.description:
$585.13 · Very Good · The Rubber Bridge Gang

Squier Classic Vibe Bass VI in Olympic White, complete with a professionally intonated rubber bridge.

Unlike most Bass VIs you'll find for sale new, this one has already had the setup work that these instruments are known to need. Bass VI owners are very familiar with the common issues: the factory setup often leaves the low E feeling floppy, and many players end up adding a neck shim to improve the break angle, stability, and overall playability.

This Bass VI has already been properly set up:

  • Neck shim installed for improved break angle and playability.
  • Low E upgraded to a .100 gauge, giving a much tighter, more stable feel than the factory string.
  • Intonation and action dialed in.
  • Everything works exactly as it should.


Rubber Bridge

The included rubber bridge is fully intonated, has radius (12) and installs in seconds.

Simply loosen the strings, lift out the original bridge, drop in the rubber bridge, retune, and you're ready to go. No modifications, no drilling, no permanent changes.

Similar rubber bridges sold on reverb cost around €100 including shipping to Europe.


Condition

Overall the instrument is mint, with one exception:

There was a small ding on the lower back of the body which has been repaired. The surface is completely smooth—you cannot feel the repair with your finger—but it remains visible when looking closely. Please see the photos.

The repaired area is slightly brighter than the surrounding finish, as matching the aged white of an older instrument perfectly is extremely difficult. This is only cosmetic and does not affect the integrity of the repair.


Optional

A Mono case is available for €120 extra (New Price is 220 Euro)


Shipping

Worldwide shipping Posssible. Message me with your country and I'll provide an exact shipping quote.

For more Builds and mods you can check out @therubberbridgegang on Instagram and facebook.

item.title: Maruszczyk Frog 4a Headless 2025 - White Gloss — $2,229.41
item.description:
$2,229.41 · Excellent · Bass Direct

2025 Maruszczyk Frog 4a Headless in mint condition, this bass features a unique logo on the face of the body which looks very cool indeed.

Delano pickups are coupled with the Maruszczyk preamp for versatility and power.

Gigbag included.

item.description:

Absolutely stunning NS5-XL from Spector in the USA!

This 2009 model features a walnut body core topped with a beautiful buckeye burl top, finished in natural gloss.

The bass is fitted with EMG pickups for versatility and punch and a Fishman preamp onboard.

Hardcase included.

item.title: Ibanez BTB1806 2016 - Natural Low Gloss — $1,463.96
item.description:
$1,463.96 · Very Good · Bass Direct

The BTB1806 is a six string BTB series solid body electric bass model introduced by Ibanez for 2017. It was made in Indonesia as part of the mid-tier Premium line.

The BTB1806 features neck through body construction with a rosewood top and back on ash wings attached to a graphite reinforced, nine-piece wenge, bubinga and maple neck with a 24-fret rosewood fingerboard with binding and offset abalone dot position markers. The body has a double cutaway design with very distinctive, narrow, curving horns. Components include a pair of Aguilar DCB passive pickups channeled through an Ibanez custom preamp with a three-band EQ, stainless steel frets including a zero fret with Premium fret edge treatment, individually mounted Mono-rail V bridges with 17mm string spacing, a locking Neutrik stereo output jack, a plastic nut, and Gotoh tuning machines.

This bass is in great condition with the Ibanez soft case included.


  • Serial Number: I 1610116545
  • Origin: Indonesia
  • Year: 2016
  • Body Material: Ash, rosewood
  • Colour: Natural
  • Finish: Satin
  • Neck Finish: Satin
  • Neck Material: Wenge, bubinga, maple
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood
  • Inlays: Dots, side dots
  • Pickups: Aguilar
  • Electronics: Ibanez
  • Controls: Volume, pickup pan, bass, middle, treble
  • Pickguard: N/A
  • Hardware: Gold
  • Gig Bag/Case: Softcase
  • Accessories: N/A
  • Frets: 24
  • String Spacing: 17.5mm
  • Nut Width: 54mm
  • Scale Length: 35”
  • Weight: 11lbs0oz/5.0kg

item.title: Rickenbacker 4001 Left-handed Bass 1978 - Jetglo — $4,182.76
item.description:
$4,182.76 · Very Good · Rigby Music MCR

This is a Rickenbacker 4001 Left-handed Bass in great condition. It does have some knocks on the headstock, neck and body, as pictured. A battery compartment has been routed on the back and it has two controls rewired to an active pre-amp.

The guitar is fully set up in house by Pete before it ships out, if you have any particular requests with this do get in touch and we will help out if we can. (Please note, set ups may shift ever so slightly in transit). 

Model: Rickenbacker 4001 left-handed bass

Colour: Jetglo

Year: 1978

Mods: See main description.

Weight: 4.6KG

Case: Yes

item.title: Warwick Streamer Stage 1 from 1986 in Natural with original Hardcase — $3,343.63
item.description:
$3,343.63 · Good · No1 Guitar Center GmbH

This beautiful (used) Warwick Streamer Stage 1 from 1986 is for sale in our store.

Built in Germany, this bass represents Warwick's flagship craftsmanship, offering outstanding playability, exceptional build quality, and the distinctive growl the Streamer Stage I is known for.

The combination of premium tonewoods and active electronics delivers a versatile sound that easily covers everything from punchy fingerstyle tones to aggressive slap and rock sounds. The neck is comfortable and fast, making it equally suitable for studio work and live performance.

The bass shows typical signs of use for its age but it is fully functional, professionally set up, and ready to play.

The instrument will be shipped in the original hardcase.

Apart from a few possible minor changes, this guitar is original.

All instruments are in the shop and will be serviced before shipping.

For international safe & secure shipping: Please send your country, city and postal code.

We will calculate the rate for you door to door.

For the import in your country we cannot certify Lacey Act, TSCA or other regulations.

This has to be done by the buyer.

item.title: Sterling StingRay Ray34 — $931.44
item.description:
$931.44 · Very Good · Zorglob

Une jolie Ray34, manche érable touche palissandre, 3eq. Belle qualité de fabrication.

Frettes peu marquées.

Quelques rayures superficielles habituelles, rien de rédhibitoire.

Elle n'a rien à envier à sa grande sœur américaine.

A noter un point de soudure serait à refaire proprement au niveau du connecteur de la pile 9v.

item.title: Hofner 500/1-64 Reissue Violin Bass Left Handed 2017 - Violin Sunburst — $2,056.52
item.description:
$2,056.52 · Very Good · BassBros

Here we have a lovely left handed Hofner 500/1-64 1964 Reissue Violin Bass. This is a superb example in the classic violin sunburst finish. This is in excellent condition with a few small light marks throughout, and has had a binding repair on the back. Everything is in good working order including the electronics and the trussrod. The original fitted Hofner hardcase and certificate are included.

- Part Exchange Welcome -

Serial Number - T0622H021
Year - 2017
Colour - Violin Sunburst
Body Finish - Gloss
Body Wood - Maple Back+Sides/Spruce Top
Neck Finish - Gloss
Neck Wood - Maple
Fretboard - Rosewood
Frets - 22
Scale Length - 30"
Weight - 5lb / 2.3kg
Electronics - Passive
Pickups - Hofner Single Coil
Gigbag/Hardcase - Fitted Hardcase + Certificate

item.title: 1971 -73 Gibson SB-400 - Walnut - Project / Husk — $250
item.description:
$250 · Non Functioning · Fishers' Music

1971 -73 Gibson SB-400 project / husk. Included aftermarket tuners and an aftermarket bridge that has been counter sunk into the body. The truss rod nut area has been modified / relieved and truss rod appears to be non-functional. The body also appears to have been painted black, but the neck shows the original finish with no breaks but has the expected amount of wear and checking. The frets show wear, but no grooves or damage.

item.title: Spector Euro 4 LX Bass Guitar - Black Cherry Gloss — $2,649.99
item.description:
$2,649.99 · Mint · PRO DG AMERICA

The Spector Euro4 LX has everything a discerning bass player could want. A comfortable, carved European alder body is capped with an eye-catching North American figured maple top — a balanced-sounding combination that melds warmth, sustain, and bite into a gorgeous tonal cocktail. An easy-playing 24-fret rosewood fingerboard rests upon a super-stable 3-piece maple neck. Experience maximum sonic impact by virtue of Spector’s acclaimed TonePump active preamp and premium EMG P/J pickups. Complete with slick-looking crown fingerboard inlays, the Euro4 LX is a well-equipped 4-string electric bass. The Euro4 LX includes a TonePump active preamp with an internal boost trimpot. This preamp employs JFET-based circuitry rather than op-amps, which yields many tube-like characteristics. When you overdrive an op-amp (something that happens at the peak of nearly every note you play), it clips and needs a moment to recover. This results in a perceptible tone loss. Like tubes, the TonePump’s JFET-based circuitry doesn’t do this. Rather, it softly distorts, producing a second harmonic that fuses seamlessly into your note. Beyond that, the first signal after the peak comes through loud and clear — no recovery time required. The bassists are impressed with the clarity of this preamp — it makes a world of difference! The Spector Euro4 LX comes loaded with EMG pickups. These premium hum-canceling pickups deliver an open, resonant sound and unmatched note articulation. This classic P/J pairing features single-conductor shielded cable that minimizes unwanted interference. The wide range of tones that these pickups exhibit is well-suited for any playing style. If you’ve always craved a Spector NS bass but found them to be out of your budget, you’ll dig the Euro Series. These basses are essentially production versions of those coveted instruments, with the same sleek carved bodies as their US-made cousins. Euro Series basses were handcrafted in the Czech Republic using top-shelf tonewoods from the United States and Europe — you’ll love the natural resonance and tone of these instruments. What’s more, you get graphite-reinforced truss rods, premium pickups, and Spector’s acclaimed TonePump active preamp. The Euro Series continues Stuart Spector’s decades-long tradition of innovation. Features:
  • Production version of the legendary Spector NS bass
  • European alder body is capped with an eye-catching North American figured maple top
  • Easy-playing 24-fret rosewood fingerboard rests upon a super-stable 3-piece maple neck
  • TonePump active preamp with an internal boost trimpot delivers maximum clarity
  • EMG P/J pickups yield an open, resonant sound and unmatched note articulation
  • Slick-looking mother-of-pearl crown fingerboard inlays
UPC:838164000358

item.title: Spector Legend 5 Standard Bass Guitar - Black Cherry Gloss — $599.99
item.description:
$599.99 · Mint · PRO DG AMERICA

The Spector Legend 5 Standard's iconic Ned Steinberger-designed NS body, beautifully rendered in lightweight ash with an eye-popping flamed maple veneer top, delivers style and performance that meet the needs of working pros and weekend warriors alike. The Legend 5 Standard's easy-playing bolt-on neck is built from three pieces of hard maple and fortified with a heavy-duty dual-action truss rod for rock-solid stability. On top, an amara fingerboard with dot inlays delivers classic Spector playability. Onboard you'll find a pair of custom-wound Spector soapbar pickups and a proprietary active 2-band EQ packing 12dB of boost and cut. Whether you're staking your claim in the Spector Bass landscape for the first time or looking for a high-performance stage axe, the Spector Legend 5 Standard is a sound investment. The Legend 5 Standard holds down the low end in style. That's largely thanks to a pair of powerful Spector Soapbar pickups stationed in the middle and bridge positions. This arrangement gives you the low-end punch from the middle pickup, along with the aggressive growl from the soapbar at the bridge. Mix up your signature blend, and you're ready to rock. The Legend 5 Standard comes equipped with a proprietary preamp circuit with interactive bass and treble controls that provide for 12dB of boost or cut. Combined with individual volume controls for each pickup, the Legend 5 Standard has the sound-shaping capabilities to handle any style of music you're likely to encounter. Features:
  • Flamed maple veneer top, ash body; gloss finish
  • Bolt-on 3-piece maple neck, Spector profile; satin finish
  • Amara fingerboard, 16-inch radius, dot inlays
  • 35-inch scale length; 24 medium-jumbo frets
  • 2 passive Spector Soapbar pickups
  • Active 2-band EQ with Bass and Treble controls
  • Bridge and Neck Volume controls
  • Hi-Mass bridge
  • 1.75-inch Graphite nut
  • Sealed die-cast tuners
  • Dual-action truss rod, headstock access
UPC:838164004066

item.title: Spector Legend 4 Standard Bass Guitar - Black Cherry Gloss — $549.99
item.description:
$549.99 · Mint · PRO DG AMERICA

The Spector Legend 4 Standard's iconic Ned Steinberger-designed NS body, beautifully rendered in lightweight ash with an eye-popping flamed maple veneer top, delivers style and performance that meet the needs of working pros and weekend warriors alike. The Legend 4 Standard's easy-playing 3-piece bolt-on neck is built from maple and pakauk and fortified with a heavy-duty dual-action truss rod for rock-solid stability. On top, an amara fingerboard with dot inlays delivers classic Spector playability. Onboard you'll find a pair of custom-wound Spector P/J pickups and a proprietary active 2-band EQ packing 12dB of boost and cut. Whether you're staking your claim in the Spector Bass landscape for the first time or looking for a high-performance stage axe, the Spector Legend 4 Standard is a sound investment. The Legend 4 Standard holds down the low end in style. That's largely thanks to a pair of powerful Spector pickups, fitted in classic "P-J" configuration. This arrangement gives you the low-end punch from the split-coil P-style pickup in the middle position, along with the aggressive growl from the J-type single-coil at the bridge. Mix up your signature blend, and you're ready to rock. The Legend 4 Standard comes equipped with a proprietary preamp circuit with interactive bass and treble controls that provide for 12dB of boost or cut. Combined with individual volume controls for each pickup, the Legend 4 Standard has the sound-shaping capabilities to handle any style of music you're likely to encounter. Features:
  • Flamed maple veneer top, ash body; gloss finish
  • Bolt-on 3-piece maple/pakauk neck, Spector profile; satin finish
  • Amara fingerboard, 16-inch radius, dot inlays
  • 34-inch scale length; 24 medium-jumbo frets
  • Spector P-J passive pickups
  • Active 2-band EQ with Bass and Treble controls
  • Bridge and Neck Volume controls
  • Hi-Mass bridge
  • 1.57-inch Graphite nut
  • Sealed die-cast tuners
  • Dual-action truss rod, headstock access
UPC:838164004127

item.title: ESP LTD B-5E Neck-thru active 5-string bass (Mahogany top version) — $752.32
item.description:
$752.32 · Good · Franck goes back to Switzerland

I have way too many basses ;-) and decided to sell a handful of them.

Like most of the basses I'm currently selling, this one has had a full setup (including the nut) by an excellent luthier. Low action and perfect intonation.

Neck-thru construction, with great sustain while maintaining a nice punch. Excellent pickups. I love this bass, it sounds great, and I recorded several songs with it. But it's heavy (4.5 kgs), which feels heavy now that I'm 63. ;-)

Equipped with rather fresh d'Addario EXL-170 + XLB135 (B-string). They still have a lot of "zing" (I keep all my guitars and basses clean and fresh).

This bass has several cosmetic imperfections, that you can see on the last 6 pictures:

  • A dent on the head's cuspid (pictures 17+18)
  • A slight reddish stain/coloration on the back of the body, along the neck-thru (picture 19)
  • A slight yellow-ish stain/coloration on the back of the body, which is visible ONLY against the light (picture 20), but totally invisible with any other light angle (picture 21)
  • A ±4mm defect (manufacturing defect?) in the wood just behind the nut (picture 22)

I'll gladly reply to any enquiries. ☺

item.title: Schecter Stiletto Studio-5 FL, 35" Active Fretless 5-String Bass, 2018, professionally leveled fingerboard — $1,145.19
item.description:
$1,145.19 · Very Good · Franck goes back to Switzerland

This beautiful 5-string fretless, mainly made out of mahogany, is now a little too heavy (4.2kg) for my old shoulders... Too bad, cause it's a fantastic instrument and a joy to play.

Like most of the basses I sell, it had a full setup by an excellent luthier. Also, the fingerboard had a full professional leveling (value: 175€). This allows low action with lots of mwah, without any buzz.

Fantastic sustain from the neck-thru construction.

Bonus: a 3rd, front-mounted straplock has been added, which helps a lot for playing comfort, and to prevent tendonitis and/or carpian tunnel syndrome.

Equipped with d'Addario EXL220BT + XLB135. The strings still sound fresh.

This bass has three very small imperfections, that you can see on the last 4 pictures:

  • A dent on one of the headstock's cuspids (picture 17)
  • Small dents on the lower side (picture 18)
  • A scratch on the top, close to the bridge (photo 19)

I'll gladly reply to any question. ☺

item.title: Fender American Vintage II 1966 Jazz Bass 2023 - Sea Foam Green — $2,195.95
item.description:
$2,195.95 · Excellent · Bass Direct

The Fender® American Vintage II series presents a remarkably accurate take on the revolutionary designs that altered the course of musical history. Built with period-accurate bodies, necks and hardware, premium finishes and meticulously voiced, year-specific pickups, each instrument captures the essence of authentic Fender craftsmanship and tone.

When Don Randall at Fender Sales requested a more sophisticated, high-end bass model, the now iconic Jazz Bass® was the result. The neck was narrower at the nut, providing a faster and more effortless feel and the sleek new body style mirrored the offset contoured style of the Jazzmaster®. By 1966, evolution of the instrument reached new heights with striking new features.

The American Vintage II 1966 Jazz Bass features a comfortable “U” shape hard rock maple neck, and it plays like a dream with a 7.25″ radius round-lam rosewood fingerboard and vintage tall frets. Characteristic of production in 1966, this J-Bass® is offered with white neck binding, pearl dots, two volume controls with master tone, matching painted headstock and 4-ply tortoiseshell pickguard. The 4-saddle bridge with threaded saddles, vintage-style “lollipop” tuners and Pure Vintage ’66 Jazz Bass pickups deliver classic thump and style.

The instruments in the American Vintage II series are direct descendants of the original Fenders: designed for players with a fine appreciation for vintage Fender tone and feel and built with unmatched quality, down to the last screw. These are Fender electrics in their purest form: Fender American Vintage II, the stuff of legends.

In great condition throughout and supplied with its original hardcase.

The bass benefits from a full setup in our workshop with new La Bella roundwound strings – Our fave!


  • Serial Number: V2319602
  • Origin: USA
  • Year: 2023
  • Body Material: Alder
  • Colour: Sea Foam Green
  • Finish: Nitro
  • Neck Finish: Nitro
  • Neck Material: Maple
  • Fingerboard: Rosewood
  • Inlays: Dots, side dots
  • Pickups: Fender
  • Electronics: Passive
  • Controls: Volume, volume, tone
  • Pickguard: Tortoiseshell
  • Hardware: Chrome
  • Gig Bag/Case: Case
  • Accessories: N/A
  • Frets: 20
  • String Spacing: 20mm
  • Nut Width: 38mm
  • Scale Length: 34”
  • Weight: 4.0kg/8lbs15oz

item.title: Guild Pilot 1984 - Red — $1,400
item.description:
$1,400 · Very Good · For sale by Rich

Rare lefty and red !


Great condition with well used hard s case

item.title: Mayones Jabba HF Aged 5, NAMM 2026 16/50, Sunburst, Swamp Ash Body, 1pc Maple TEW Neck, Rosewood Fretboard, Block Inlays, Clear Plexi Ramp, Mayones Double Deck Bass Case — $5,300
item.description:
$5,300 · Brand New · The Music Loft

Get the look and vibe of a vintage classic, but with the precision manufacturing and attention-to-detail only the finest modern production can provide with this sleek Mayones Jabba HF Aged 5! Hadrien Feraud teamed up with the folks at Mayones to deliver an instant classic with this signature model bass. Shown in Aged Sunburst and finished in Nitrocellulose, the look and the feel are there! But it doesn't stop there. Loaded with Delano pickups feeding into the Musashi 3-band preamp, this bass delivers everything from classic to modern tones, suitable for all genres. As Hadrien exclaims: “She’s stunning and will simultaneously keep up, play along and challenge you on all aspects and genres. Time to get your act together, that’s a keeper right there!”

 

"When I needed to own a bass that would be utterly versatile from Pop music to Straight ahead Jazz with a lot of punch, clarity, sustain, great comfort, an awesome look and last but not least, light weighted, I called Dawid and here is the result! Extremely proud and grateful for this collaboration, Dawid and his team at Mayones guitars & basses never cease to amaze me. Please see and try it yourself!"

– Hadrien Feraud

 

Specs:

  • Radius: 20"
  • Neck Wood: 1pc Maple TEW (Tonally Enhanced Wood)
  • Fretboard Wood: Rosewood
  • Side Dots: Luminlay Super Green with Black Piping
  • Inlays: Blocks - White Pearloid
  • Frets: Ferd Wagner Nickel Silver
  • Construction: Bolt-On
  • Scale Length: 34.25"
  • Binding: None
  • Body Wood: Swamp Ash
  • Pickup Configuration: J-J (60's spacing)
  • Controls: Volume (Push/Pull Active/Passive), Balance, Treble, Middle, Bass
  • Body Color: Transparent Sunburst Aged - Nitrocellulose
  • Neck Color: Trans Vintage Yellow - Nitrocellulose
  • Finish: Aged
  • Electronics: Velvetrone / Musashi Nitoryu 3 / Bass Preamp and M-Headphones System
  • Pickups: Delano JMVC 5 FE/M2, White Bobbins
  • Ramp: Clear Plexi
  • Bridge: Mayones Bigfoot Bass Bridge
  • Tuners: Hipshot Ultralite Clover
  • Nut: GraphTech Tusq
  • Knobs: Metal Dome
  • Pickguard: 3ply White Pearl
  • Hardware Color: Gold
  • Strap Buttons: Schaller S Locks Strap Locks
  • Electronics Cavity Cover: Custom - NAMM 2026 16/50
  • Weight: 9lb 10oz
  • Case: Mayones Hybrid Double Deck Bass Case

item.title: YAMAHA BB414 Broad Bass Black 34" Long Scale w/Soft Case — $585
item.description:
$585 · Very Good · J-Sound Garage

Up for sale is a used YAMAHA BB414 Broad Bass Black 34" Long Scale w/Soft Case.

The body is in excellent condition with no noticeable scratches or dents.

The truss rod is tight when turned clockwise, leaving little room for further adjustment in that direction. However, the neck is currently straight with no twisting.

**Condition:**

* **Neck:** Straight, with no twisting
* **Truss Rod:** Tight in the clockwise (tightening) direction
* **Electronics:** All electronics and controls function properly
* **Frets:** Approximately 70–80% remaining

The bass has been thoroughly tested and is fully functional.

Any further adjustments to suit the player’s personal preference are the responsibility of the buyer.
If you have any questions or concerns about this item, please contact us before making your purchase.
Please note that the actual colors of the product may slightly vary depending on your monitor settings and lighting conditions.
The item will be carefully packed using sturdy cardboard to minimize the risk of damage during international shipping.

item.title: Nash JB-63 — $2,100
item.description:
$2,100 · Excellent · Cuz's Gear Hut

Custom Bill Nash JB-63 Jazz Bass in Lake Placid Metallic Blue finish, original tortoise pick guard, Rosewood fingerboard, Lollar single coil pick ups and original Nash hard shell alligator case. This model is considered lightly reliced and has small signs scattered on the guitar in theme with the relic nature along with the worn finish on the back on the neck. This bass is in wonderful condition, plays very well and sounds super powerful and punchy with the Lollar pickups. Braided 10' Nash guitar cable included as well. Guitar will ship in a sturdy, strong box designed specifically for shipping bass guitars. Please feel free to reach out with any other questions

item.title: Fender American Ultra II Precision Bass® with Ebony Fingerboard in Noble Blue — $2,299.99
item.description:
$2,299.99 · Brand New · The Guitar Sanctuary

The Apex of Modern Performance: Precision Bass Evolution Redefined

The Guitar Sanctuary is exceptionally thrilled to present the brand-new Fender American Ultra II Precision Bass in the breathtaking, premium Noble Blue finish. The American Ultra II series represents Fender’s most advanced, high-performance lineup of electric instruments, engineered specifically for discerning players who demand absolute structural precision, effortless playability, and state-of-the-art tonal flexibility. Merging the timeless, foundational punch of the classic split-coil P-Bass with cutting-edge ergonomic contours and elite active electronics, this bass is built to dominate both the modern studio tracking room and the world's largest stages.

Advanced Ergonomics & High-Performance Neck Architecture

The American Ultra II Precision Bass features a highly resonant, select Alder body outfitted with deeply sculpted rear contours and a tapered neck heel for uninhibited access to the highest frets. The lightning-fast quartersawn maple neck sports a comfortable Modern "D" profile with ultra-smooth, slick satin urethane finish. For the second-generation Ultra II series, Fender has elevated the playing surface with a premium, dark Ebony fingerboard featuring a versatile 10"-14" compound radius, detailed rolled edges, medium-jumbo frets, and ultra-high-visibility Luminlay side dots that glow in dark stage environments.

Next-Generation Electronics: Ultra II Noiseless & 18V Preamp Power

Beneath the hood, this bass balances legendary vintage character with modern, whisper-quiet performance:

  • Ultra II Noiseless Pickups: Loaded with a powerhouse PJ pickup configuration featuring a newly designed Ultra II Noiseless Precision Bass split-coil in the middle and an Ultra II Noiseless Jazz Bass single-coil at the bridge. This setup serves up definitive vintage thump and bite completely free of single-coil hum or interference.
  • Redesigned 18-Volt Active Preamp: Equipped with a powerful, high-headroom active 3-band EQ powered by dual 9V batteries, allowing you to boost or cut Treble, Midrange, and Bass frequencies with extreme precision via premium Stealth Taper pots.
  • Active/Passive Mini-Toggle & S-1 Switch: A dedicated mini-toggle switch lets you bypass the preamp instantly for a pure, organic passive P-bass tone. Pressing the master volume's integrated S-1 switch reconfigures the pickup wiring from series to parallel, instantly doubling your available onboard sonic options.
Premium Technical Specifications
  • Origin: Handcrafted in Corona, California, USA.
  • Body Wood: Premium Select Alder.
  • Finish: Gloss Polyurethane Noble Blue with matching 3-ply pickguard.
  • Neck Wood: Quartersawn Maple (Satin Urethane Finish, Gloss Headstock Face).
  • Neck Profile: Modern "D" Shape with Tapered Heel.
  • Fingerboard: Premium Ebony (10" to 14" Compound Radius) with Rolled Edges.
  • Scale Length: 34" Long Scale.
  • Nut Material: Graph Tech TUSQ (1.625" Nut Width).
  • Position Markers: White Pearloid Dot Inlays with Ultra-Visible Luminlay Glow-in-the-Dark Side Dots.
  • Pickups: Ultra II Noiseless P-Bass (Middle), Ultra II Noiseless J-Bass (Bridge).
  • Controls: Master Volume (with S-1 Switch), Pan Pot (Pickup Selector), Treble/Bass Stacked Pot, Midrange/Active-Passive Mini-Toggle Pot.
  • Hardware: 4-Saddle HiMass Toploaded/String-Through Bridge, Fender "F" Light-Weight Vintage-Paddle Tuners with Tapered Shafts.
  • Case Protection: Shipped inside a premium Fender Deluxe Molded Hardshell Case.
  • Best For: Modern Session Bassists, High-Definition Recording Studios, Diverse Live Touring, Progressive Rock, Funk, Pop, and Elite Worship Sets.
  • Tone Profile: Punchy low-end growl, articulate mid-range definition, crisp and noise-free high-end snap, massive tonal versatility.
  • Compared To: Music Man StingRay Special, Sadowsky MetroLine P-Style, Fender American Professional II Precision Bass.
  • Sanctuary Expert Note: "Fender knocked it out of the park with the Ultra II series upgrades. The Ebony board combined with the rolled edges makes this neck feel like a broken-in masterbuilt instrument right out of the box. The real magic is in the new 18V active preamp and Ultra II Noiseless pickups—you get that authentic, chest-thumping classic P-bass groove in passive mode, but flipping the active toggle lets you dial in modern, mid-scooped slap tones or laser-focused rock bite completely free of hum. It's a true professional workhorse tool."

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass 1968 - Natural Refin — $4,298.95
item.description:
$4,298.95 · Fair · Florian's Gear Locker

Up for sale is this authentic 1968 Fender Jazz Bass. A true "Player's Grade" instrument with incredible mojo and a monstrous tone. Perfect for a musician looking for that genuine late-60s vintage growl without paying full collector prices. The bass has been modified over the years, as shown in the pictures.

Specs & Condition:

  • Neck & Setup: The bass just came back from a professional luthier and the verdict is great: the neck is straight, healthy, and plays like a dream. The setup is optimized with a very comfortable low action (under 2mm / 5/64"). The truss rod works but is currently maxed out, so the luthier advises against tightening it further. As it sits, the bass is perfectly stable, well-set, and ready to gig.
  • Electronics: Upgraded with 1980s DiMarzio pickups. Huge, warm, and powerful tone with excellent output.

Details & Shipping:

  • Sold WITHOUT gigbag or case.
  • Safe shipping available anywhere in Europe in a bulletproof, fully insured box (UPS / DHL). Local pickup also welcome (Nantes / Clisson area, France).
  • Sold As-Is.

Feel free to ask any questions or request more photos!

item.title: Classic Vibe '70s Jazz Bass 3TS — $529.99
item.description:
$529.99 · Brand New · Twangecaster

The Classic Vibe '70s Jazz Bass® is a nod to the 1970s evolution of the J Bass®, combining the luxurious playability that made it famous with the versatility and massive tone of its dual Fender-Designed alnico single-coil pickups. Player-friendly features include a slim, comfortable "C"-shaped neck profile with an easy-playing 9.5"-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets, as well as a vintage-style bridge with slotted barrel saddles for solid string stability. This throwback Squier model also features 1970s-inspired headstock markings, rich-looking nickel-plated hardware and a slick vintage-tint gloss neck finish for an old-school vibe.

Features
  • 100% Designed by Fender
  • Inspired by 1970s-era Jazz Bass models
  • Fender-Designed alnico pickups
  • Vintage-tint gloss neck finish
  • Nickel-plated hardware
  • Neck Headstock Jazz Bass® Neck Material Maple Neck Finish Tinted Gloss Urethane Neck Shape "C" Shape Fingerboard Radius 9.5" (241 mm) Fingerboard Material Maple Position Inlays Black Block Number of Frets 20 Truss Rod Head Adjust String Nut Bone Nut Width 1.5" (38.1 mm) Nut Material Bone Fret Size Narrow Tall Scale Length 34" (864 mm)     Body Body Poplar Body Finish Gloss Polyurethane Body Shape Jazz Bass® Body Material Poplar Hardware Bridge 4-Saddle Vintage-Style Pickguard 3-Ply Black Pickup Covers Black Control Knobs Black Plastic Hardware Finish Nickel Tuning Machines Vintage-Style String Trees Vintage-Style Disc Strings Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges) Neck Plate 4-Bolt Squier® Strap Buttons Standard     Electronics Bridge Pickup Fender® Designed Alnico Single-Coil Neck Pickup Fender® Designed Alnico Single-Coil Pickup Configuration SS Controls Volume 1. (Neck Pickup), Volume 2. (Bridge Pickup), Master Tone Switching None

item.title: Schecter C-5 Standard guitar in Tobacco Burl — $499
item.description:
$499 · Brand New · Studio Gears

Schecter C-5 Standard 5-String Bass in Tobacco Burl

The Schecter C-5 Standard delivers a comfortable, balanced playing experience with its lightweight construction and responsive neck profile. This 5-string bass combines premium tonewoods with high-output passive electronics, making it a capable instrument for session work, gigging, and studio recording. The distinctive Tobacco Burl finish provides striking visual appeal without compromising the instrument's solid performance fundamentals.

Build & Playability

The bolt-on roasted maple neck with a thin "C" profile and rosewood fretboard facilitates quick position shifts and comfortable extended playing sessions. A 16" fretboard radius combined with 24 jumbo frets offers both smooth playability and clear articulation, while the 35" scale length provides the proper tension and clarity expected from a quality 5-string bass platform.

Tone & Electronics

Twin Schecter Diamond Standard Soapbar pickups with high-output passive design deliver punchy, defined tone across the frequency spectrum. Independent volume and tone controls for bridge and neck pickups allow precise blending and tonal shaping without requiring active electronics or batteries.

Key Features
  • 5-string bass configuration with 35" scale length
  • Mahogany body with figured burl top and Tobacco Burl finish
  • Roasted maple neck with natural satin finish
  • Thin "C" neck profile with 16" fretboard radius
  • Rosewood fretboard with 24 jumbo frets and white dot inlays
  • 45mm graphite nut for tuning stability
  • Two Schecter Diamond Standard Soapbar passive pickups
  • Independent bridge and neck volume and tone controls
  • Schecter Diamond Bass bridge with black hardware
  • Black 1-ply binding on body and fretboard
  • Right-handed configuration, 8 lbs 7.1 oz weight
  • Bolt-on construction with black Schecter tuners

This C-5 Standard represents solid mid-range 5-string bass design with tonal versatility and dependable hardware that will serve both recording and live performance demands.

item.title: Schecter Reaper-4 guitar in Natural Satin — $1,399
item.description:
$1,399 · Brand New · Studio Gears

Schecter Reaper-4 Bass in Natural Satin

The Reaper-4 delivers a slim, fast neck profile that accommodates both precise technical playing and aggressive styles. Its lightweight swamp ash body with figured poplar burl top balances resonance with comfort during extended sessions. This is a refined instrument designed for players who demand both playability and sophisticated tone-shaping capabilities.

Playability & Construction

The thin "C" neck profile (0.787" at the 1st fret, 0.866" at the 12th) combined with a 34" scale and ebony fretboard provides effortless access across all registers. Maple with walnut stringers and 2 carbon fiber reinforcement rods ensures neck stability and longevity, while the 16" fretboard radius and 24 jumbo frets support both smooth lead work and chording. The Graph Tech XL Black Tusq nut at 38mm width delivers clarity and sustain straight from the source.

Tone & Electronics

The USA-made M-40 and P-40 pickups with smoke bobbins provide articulate, punchy output across the frequency spectrum, while the Darkglass Tone Capsule EQ with 18-volt power grants precise control over your sonic character. A master volume, blend control, and dedicated EQ section allow deep customization without compromises, This dialing in organic low-end or aggressive midrange presence.

Key Features
  • Body: Swamp Ash with Figured Poplar Burl top, bolt-on construction
  • Neck: Maple with Walnut Stringers and 2 Carbon Fiber Reinforcement Rods
  • Scale: 34 inches
  • Neck Profile: Thin "C" (0.787" at 1st fret, 0.866" at 12th fret)
  • Fretboard: Ebony, 24 Jumbo frets, 16" radius with Pearloid Offset Dot inlays
  • Nut: Graph Tech XL Black Tusq, 38mm width
  • Pickups: USA-made M-40 and P-40 with smoke bobbins
  • Electronics: Master Volume, Blend Control, Darkglass Tone Capsule EQ with 18-volt system
  • Bridge: Schecter Diamond Custom Bass Bridge with String-Thru and Top-Load option
  • Tuners: TonePros "M Series"
  • Hardware: Black and Chrome finish
  • Truss Rod: 2-Way Adjustable with 5/32" (4mm) Allen Nut

The Reaper-4 combines meticulous construction with versatile electronics to deliver a bass that rewards both technical precision and creative sound design.

item.title: Epiphone Thunderbird IV Classic Pro 2015 - 2020 - Alpine White — $776.20
item.description:
$776.20 · Very Good · TWitti

Ich verkaufe hier schweren Herzens meinen Epiphone Thunderbird Classic IV aus dem Jahr 2015 in der Farbe Alpine White.

Der Bass wurde mit einer hochwertigen Hipshot Supertone-Brücke aufgerüstet, die für eine bessere Einstellbarkeit und Stimmstabilität sorgt. Die originale Brücke ist selbstverständlich im Lieferumfang enthalten und kann bei Bedarf wieder montiert werden. Außerdem wurden Harley Benton Security Locks verbaut und ein Minotaur-Gurt montiert.

Der Bass wurde mehrere Jahre gespielt und stets gepflegt. Die Elektronik funktioniert einwandfrei.

Zum Lieferumfang gehören außerdem:

  • die originale Brücke
  • ein RockBag Gigbag

item.title: Squier Classic Vibe '70s Jazz Bass Maple Fingerboard Natural — $332
item.description:
$332 · Excellent · Dimma's Guitar Sanctuary

Excellent condition 2014 Indonesia made Squier Classic Vibe '70s Jazz Bass Maple Fingerboard Natural.

Only one lacquer chip back body/neck joint. See pictures. Rest is flawless. It was serviced and new set of D'Adario 105-45 strings put.

Ships fast CONUS states. No PO boxes

Model Info Below:

Squier's Classic Vibe '70s Jazz Bass guitar brings iconic '70s era design to the modern age. This sleek bass combines a lightweight poplar body with a maple neck and fingerboard for articulate tone and smooth playability. Two Fender-designed alnico single-coil pickups provide the warm, crisp sound that defined a generation. With a slim C-shaped neck profile, 9.5"-radius fingerboard and narrow-tall frets, this bass feels familiar and fast. Vintage-style tuners, a 4-saddle bridge, 3-ply pickguard and nickel-plated hardware complete the retro vibe. The Classic Vibe '70s Jazz Bass—a reimagined classic with vintage style and modern playability.

Fender-Designed Alnico Single-Coil Pickups

The two Fender-designed alnico single-coil pickups provide dynamic, articulate tone with balanced output. Roll back the neck pickup for a warm, round sound or blend in the bridge pickup for increased attack and high-end cut. With both pickups engaged, you'll get the full-spectrum sound that shaped '70s popular music.

Maple Neck and Fingerboard

The maple neck and fingerboard offer a smooth playing feel and bright, crisp tone. The C-shaped neck profile feels comfortably familiar for most players. A 9.5" fingerboard radius and narrow-tall frets make navigating the 34" scale length effortless. Black block position inlays provide an understated yet stylish touch.

Vintage-Style Hardware

Vintage-style tuners, a 4-saddle bridge, 3-ply pickguard and nickel-plated hardware complete the retro aesthetic. The tuners smoothly and accurately hold tune through dynamic playing. The bridge saddles securely anchor each string for rock-solid intonation.

Lightweight Poplar Body

The lightweight poplar body reduces playing fatigue and provides articulate, balanced tone. Its gloss polyurethane finish accentuates the wood grain for an organic look. A deep cutaway gives easy access to higher frets.

Neck

  • Shape: C
  • Wood: Maple
  • Neck joint: Bolt-on
  • Scale length: 34"
  • Truss rod: Standard
  • Finish: Vintage tint gloss

Pickups

  • Active or passive pickups: Passive
  • Pickup configuration: SS
  • Neck: Fender-designed alnico single-coil
  • Bridge: Fender-designed alnico single-coil
  • Brand: Fender
  • Series or parallel: Parallel

Fretboard

  • Material: Maple
  • Radius: 9.5"
  • Fret size: Narrow-Tall
  • Number of frets: 20
  • Inlays: Dot
  • Nut material: Bone
  • Nut width: 1.5" (38.1 mm)

Body

  • Cutaway: Double cutaway
  • Construction: Solidbody
  • Body wood: Poplar
  • Body finish: Gloss
  • Orientation: Right handed

Controls

  • Control layout: Volume 1, volume 2, master tone

Hardware

  • Bridge type: Fixed
  • Bridge design: 4-saddle vintage style
  • Tuning machines: Open-geared vintage style
  • Color: Nickel

item.title: White Over Paisley Relic 4-String J-Style Bass by Dhatarattha — $599
item.description:
$599 · Brand New · Dhatarattha Guitars USA

The DEB4 is a 4-string bass built for players who want modern playability, solid low-end response, and a unique visual style.

Finished in a White Over Paisley Relic nitro lacquer finish, it features a mahogany body, roasted maple neck, rosewood fretboard, stainless steel frets, and a 3-band EQ system paired with hand-wound Laohao pickups.

The dual single-coil pickup configuration delivers tight lows, clear articulation, and enough top-end presence for slap, funk, rock, and modern jazz applications.


Body

Body Material: Mahogany

Body Finish: Paisley Relic

Body Paint: Nitro

Body Construction: Solid

Neck

Neck Material: Roasted Maple

Neck Construction: One-Piece

Neck Joint: Bolt-On

Neck Finish: Satin

Neck Shape: C-shape

Scale Length: 864mm / 34"

Fretboard Material: Rosewood

Fretboard Radius: 350mm

Number of Frets: 20 Frets

Fret Material: Stainless Steel

Fret Size: Medium Jumbo

Nut Material: Bone

Nut Width: 42mm

Position Inlays: Block Inlays

Binding: N/A

Side Dots: Glow in the Dark

Truss Rod: Dual Action 2-Way

Electronics

Bridge Pickup: Laohao Hand Made Single-Coil Pickup

Middle Pickup: N/A

Neck Pickup: Laohao Hand Made Single-Coil Pickup

Switching: N/A

Configuration: SS

Special Electronics: 3-Band EQ

Hardware

Bridge: Hardtail

Hardware Finish: Chrome

Machine Heads: Chrome Open-Geared Clover-Style

Pickguard: Transparent

Miscellaneous/Special Features

Strings: 45-105

Weight: tbc

Accessories

Included Accessories:  Truss Rod Adjustment Key, Bridge Adjustment Key, Strap Locks

item.title: Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Charcoal Burst B-Stock 0275 — $959.20
item.description:
$959.20 · B-Stock · Studio Gears

Schecter C-5 GT Bass Satin Charcoal Burst B-Stock

The Schecter C-5 GT is a five-string bass engineered for extended-range playing with a balanced, ergonomic design. Its thin "C"-shaped neck and set-neck construction deliver immediate comfort and responsiveness, while the 35" scale provides the tonal clarity and definition expected in modern bass work.

Playability & Build Quality

A 3-piece maple neck with thin "C" profile (.787" at the first fret, .866" at the 12th) connects to a mahogany body with flamed maple top via set-neck construction with ultra-access for fretboard work. The 24 extra-jumbo frets on a 16" radius ebony fretboard support aggressive playing styles and smooth bends across the extended range, while the 2-way adjustable truss rod with heel access ensures stable setup.

Tone & Electronics

A pair of EMG pickups—the EMG 40DC at the bridge and EMG 40P5 at the neck—drive a 2-band EMG EQ with volume and blend controls, delivering punchy highs and articulate low-end response. The Schecter custom bass bridge with string-thru design and Graph Tech Black Tusq XL nut maximize sustain and tonal transfer.

Key Features
  • Body: Mahogany with flamed maple top
  • Neck: 3-piece maple, set-neck construction with ultra access
  • Fretboard: Ebony with 24 extra-jumbo frets
  • Fretboard radius: 16" (406mm)
  • Neck shape: Thin "C" profile (.787" at 1st fret, .866" at 12th fret)
  • Scale length: 35" (889mm)
  • Nut: Graph Tech Black Tusq XL, 1.771" width
  • Pickups: EMG 40DC (bridge) and EMG 40P5 (neck)
  • Electronics: Volume/Blend/2-Band EMG EQ with 9-volt clip-in battery
  • Bridge: Schecter custom bass bridge with string-thru design
  • Hardware: Black
  • Inlays: Offset/Reverse Roman numerals

This B-stock Schecter C-5 GT combines premium components with professional construction, offering serious tone and playability at a significant discount.

item.title: Takamine GB30CE-NAT G-Series Acoustic Electric Bass in Natural Finish — $799
item.description:
$799 · Brand New · Studio Gears

Takamine GB30CE-NAT G-Series Acoustic Electric Bass in Natural Finish

The GB30CE-NAT delivers responsive, comfortable playability with its sculpted soft Venetian-style cutaway body and smooth mahogany neck that invite effortless fretting and fluid movement across the fretboard. The natural finish showcases beautiful wood grain while delivering a warm, woody tone with articulate clarity, equally suited to jazz, folk, blues, and contemporary acoustic settings. This instrument rewards both meticulous technique and instinctive playing, making every session feel inspiring.

Construction & Tone

A solid spruce top paired with mahogany back and sides forms the acoustic foundation, while the mahogany neck with dovetail joint ensures structural integrity and resonant sustain. The 16"-radius rosewood fingerboard with pearl dot inlays and synthetic bone nut and bridge saddle contribute to balanced tonal response across the full frequency range, from deep, resonant lows to crisp, punchy highs.

Electronics & Playability

The Takamine TK-40B preamp system includes a built-in tuner, three-band EQ, gain control, mid-shift control, bass-boost switch, and EQ bypass—giving you complete tonal shaping at your fingertips This fingerpicking intricate lines or laying down solid groove foundations. Chrome die-cast tuners and a rosewood headcap complete the hardware package.

Key Features
  • Solid spruce top with mahogany back and sides
  • Soft Venetian-style cutaway for upper-fret access
  • Mahogany neck with dovetail joint
  • 16"-radius rosewood fingerboard with pearl dot inlays
  • Synthetic bone nut and bridge saddle
  • Takamine TK-40B preamp with built-in tuner, three-band EQ, gain control, mid-shift, bass-boost, and EQ bypass
  • Chrome die-cast tuners
  • Rosewood headcap with abalone rosette
  • Scale length: 864mm
  • Nut width: 45mm
  • Body dimensions: 1214.7mm length × 435mm width × 125mm depth
  • Natural finish

The GB30CE-NAT combines refined acoustic construction with modern amplification, delivering the versatility to explore dynamic range across a wide variety of musical contexts.

item.title: F Bass BN5 — $5,100
item.description:
$5,100 · Excellent · Andrew's Gear Outlet

This bass is in mint condition, used in a studio only, ebony fretboard, all original build

item.title: Atelier Z 2021 Baby Z J5 - Transparent White — $1,499.99
item.description:
$1,499.99 · Excellent · AK Guitars

Awesome and beautiful short scale bass from Sadowsky‘s heir apparent! Cool white blonde finish with active electronics and excellent build quality. Plays very well with fresh set up and nice low action on medium C neck. Medium frets with zero fretwear on maple neck with sharp white pearl block inlays. The J style proprietary pickups sound great! Very similar to a sadowsky preamp with bright clear highs and well defined, articulate lows and push/pull tone knob for more classic passive tones. The bass is super clean! No dings, scratches or any real play wear. There is a tiny finish bubble under the clear pickguard next to the screw between the two pickups that you can see if you look closely. There is a also a long scratch on the control cavity on the back. Overall looks stunning and very well kept. Awesome short scale player with tremendous tone and cool classic/modern balanced look.

Comes with the original atelier gig bag and cert.

8.95 lbs

item.title: ESP LTD FL-4 Fred Leclercq Bass Black Red Burst Satin B-Stock — $1,519.20
item.description:
$1,519.20 · B-Stock · LV Guitars

ESP LTD FL-4 Fred Leclercq Bass Black Red Burst Satin B-Stock

The FL-4 is engineered for speed and comfort in technical metal contexts, delivering an aggressive instrument that cuts through dense arrangements with authority. Its extra-thin neck profile and aggressive body contour make rapid position shifts and extended technique work feel natural, while the neck-thru construction ensures tonal stability and sustain across the full range.

Playability & Feel

The extra-thin five-piece maple/purpleheart neck with Extra Thin U contour accommodates high-speed technical work and comfortable extended technique. A Macassar ebony fingerboard with black binding and red offset dot inlays paired with 24 extra-jumbo stainless steel frets delivers smooth playability across the 400 mm (15.75") fretboard radius, while the 40 mm die-cast nut and 34" scale support precision and consistency.

Tone & Electronics

The EMG 35P active humbucker pickup generates punchy, aggressive tone suited to metal applications, controlled through a single volume knob for dynamic sound shaping. Hipshot A-style bridge and Grover mini machine heads with black hardware throughout deliver tuning stability and aesthetic cohesion with the diabolical body cutout and Black Red Burst Satin finish.

Key Features
  • Neck-thru-body construction at 34" scale
  • Alder body with Black Red Burst Satin finish
  • Five-piece maple/purpleheart neck with Extra Thin U profile
  • Macassar ebony fingerboard with black binding and red offset dot inlays
  • 24 extra-jumbo stainless steel frets
  • 400 mm (15.75") fretboard radius
  • 40 mm die-cast nut width
  • EMG 35P active humbucker pickup with volume control
  • Hipshot A-style bridge
  • Grover mini machine heads
  • Black hardware throughout
  • B-Stock: Minor cosmetic marks with zero impact on playability or tone

This Fred Leclercq signature bass pairs professional-grade hardware with neck-thru stability, delivering confident performance in demanding technical and metal contexts at B-Stock pricing.

item.title: Gretsch G6136B-TP Tom Petersson Signature Falcon Bass 2023 - White Short Scale Hollow Body — $2,999
item.description:
$2,999 · Very Good · Matthew's Gear Compendium

This is a lightly used Gretsch Tom Petersson White Falcon bass. Amazing option in the short-scale hollowbody bass market. Come strung with a fresh set of D'Addario Chrome flatwounds 45-100, which this bass came with stock. Comes with OHSC and paperwork. Shows some light play wear which I've done my best to photograph. Please feel free to ask any questions, thanks!


Premium features including a Gretsch Rumble'Tron neck pickup and custom Seymour Duncan® Super'Tron middle pickup, short scale length (30.3"), Adjusto-Matic™ bridge and Gretsch "Cadillac" tailpiece, gloss-finish maple neck with "U" profile, 12"-radius ebony fingerboard with 22 medium jumbo frets and mother-of pearl inlays, gold hardware and pickguard.

item.title: Jackson X Series Spectra Bass SBX IV Electric Bass 2019 - Satin Graphite — $500
item.description:
$500 · Excellent · Invisible Unknown Gear Shop

Jackson X Series Spectra Bass SBX IV Electric Bass Guitar Satin Graphite

Item in great condition

Overview

Durable bass made for style and tonal flexibility at an accessible price. With modern style, flexible tone and incomparable value, the Jackson X Series Spectra Bass SBX IV electric bass guitar takes the adventurous player on a bold bass odyssey. The offset Spectra Bass body style was designed for the gigging musician with a poplar body and larger upper horn that evenly distributes weight throughout the instrument for perfect balance and playing comfort. The graphite-reinforced through-body maple neck creates formidable sustain, while the laurel fingerboard provides superior playability. The SBX IV provides a full-sonic spectrum for even the most versatile and progressive bassists with dual passive medium-output humbucking pickups that deliver punch, power and clear note articulation. Wide-ranging tonal command comes from a 2-way toggle switch for pickup coil splitting, 3-band active EQ, blend control and volume control with push/pull selector to bypass or engage active circuit for the 3-band EQ. The push/pull selector eliminates the risk of losing sound due to a dead battery. A quick pull on the volume knob bypasses the active circuit, making it easy to regain sound from the bass without the use of battery power. This four-string bass also features a HiMass hardtail bridge that enhances sustain and improves attack. Features Poplar body with a satin finish Maple neck in a 34" scale length Laurel fingerboard with 24 jumbo frets Dual Jackson medium-output humbuckers
